title: thelypteris × altissima
intro: Thelypteris × altissima, also known as the altissima fern, is a hybrid species of fern that belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a type of deciduous or evergreen fern. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris × altissima include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an expectorant, making it useful for treating coughs and colds. Thelypteris × altissima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
